title: Understanding the Commutative Property
text: The commutative property of addition states that changing the order of the addends does not change the sum. For example, $$a+b$$ is the same as $$b+a$$.

title: Applying the Commutative Property
text: To apply the commutative property to the expression $$3+8$$, rearrange the numbers.

title: Rearranging the Terms
text: What is the expression when you rearrange the terms $$3$$ and $$8$$ using the commutative property?

title: Verifying the Result
text: Check if the sum of $$3+8$$ is the same as $$8+3$$ to verify the commutative property.
